changelog:
🩹 Fixed duplicate-notes bug: the offline sync loop was re-pushing already-synced notes as new creates whenever the local sync flag was reset on logout. The dispatcher now keys off the note's ID prefix (local_* vs server UUID) so genuine pending creates still go through and stale rows are simply refreshed from the server on the next pull.
🧹 One-shot dedup on the server: a new /api/v1/notes/dedup endpoint groups your notes by decrypted content and, on confirm, removes the duplicates while keeping the oldest copy of each. The app calls it after every successful sync — if nothing is duplicated, the call is a no-op and you won't see a toast; if duplicates were found, you'll see 'Cleaned up N duplicate notes from a previous sync'.
🔘 Sticky bar buttons in the note detail screen no longer collapse: each of the four primary actions (Edit / Copy / Share / Lock) now has equal weight in the row, a single-line label, and a smaller, sharper icon — no more 'L / o / c / k' stacked vertically.
